subject: Need your review before 3 PM customer call
body: Hi Alex, can you review the customer escalation notes before our 3 PM call today? The main concern is whether we can commit to the Friday patch. Please send me your recommendation by 2 PM if possible. - Maya

subject: Action required: suspicious login attempt
body: We detected a suspicious login attempt from a new location. If this was not you, reset your password using the internal security portal. Do not reply to this email with your password.

subject: Expense report deadline is tomorrow
body: Reminder: Q2 expense reports must be submitted by Friday at 5 PM. Your travel reimbursement for the Seattle customer visit is still missing receipts.

subject: Can we move our 1:1?
body: Good morning Alex, I have a conflict with our 11 AM 1:1. Could we move it to tomorrow morning or later this afternoon? I also wanted to discuss the onboarding plan.

subject: Your AI Systems Summit itinerary
body: Your registration is confirmed. Keynote begins Monday at 9 AM. Your workshop session is Tuesday at 2 PM in Room 204. Hotel check-in begins Sunday at 3 PM.

subject: This week in AI infrastructure
body: Top stories this week: new GPU benchmarks, agent frameworks, vector databases, and cloud cost optimization tips. Read the full issue online.

subject: Contract renewal approval needed
body: Hi Alex, our platform contract renewal is due Monday. Pricing remains the same if we receive approval this week. Can you confirm whether procurement should proceed?

subject: Package delivered
body: Your package was delivered to the front desk at 12:42 PM. Tracking number PX-1044-8821.

subject: Draft launch notes for review
body: Alex, I shared the draft launch notes for next week's beta. Could you review the risks section and suggest changes by end of day?

subject: Briefing request for Friday staff meeting
body: Please prepare a concise update for Friday's staff meeting: customer escalation status, beta launch readiness, and any risks requiring executive attention.

subject: Mailbox quota exceeded - verify now
body: Your mailbox quota has exceeded the limit. Verify your account immediately at http://company-security.example-login.com to avoid suspension.

subject: Follow-up on production issue
body: Thank you for the quick response yesterday. Our team needs confirmation on whether the workaround is safe to keep enabled through the weekend. We would appreciate guidance today.
